label: Exempt from Classification
note: These films are granted permission to be sold without a specific classification. This classification is usually granted to (and not limited to) educational content such as documentaries, concerts, fitness programmes, educational software and non-violent sporting events.

label: General Exhibition
note: These films are for general viewing. However, G does not necessarily designate a children's film or game as many of these productions contain content that would be of no interest to children. The content is very mild in impact.

label: Parental Guidance Recommended
note: These films and computer games contain material that may confuse or upset younger viewers. The content is mild in impact.

label: Recommended for Mature Audiences
note: These films and computer games contain material that requires a mature perspective. This classification was formerly known as M15+. There is no restriction on access. The content is moderate in impact.

label: Not Suitable for Under 15s
note: The content is considered unsuitable for exhibition by persons under the age of 15. This is a legally restricted category: persons under 15 may only legally purchase or exhibit MA15+ rated content under the supervision of an adult guardian. The content is strong in impact.

label: Restricted
note: This is a legally restricted category: persons under 18 may not buy, rent or exhibit these films. The content is high in impact.

label: Pornographic
note: This is a legally restricted category: persons under 18 may not exhibit, buy or rent films that have been issued this classification.

label: Refused Classification
note: Films which are very high in impact and/or contain any type of violence in conjunction with real sexual intercourse are Refused Classification by the OFLC.
